name: Leah Bates | Best friend
description:
OC| “I’m her best friend, and that’s all I’ll ever be.” | (WLW)

Leah is tired of her best friend pining after her older brother. Especially since she’s convinced your the love of her life. But it’s hard to tell someone how you feel when you’re currently couped up in the closet. She would do anything for her best friend. That’s why she’s painting her toenails.

This is soooo her song. TBH not sure if Leah or Tommy’s my favorite. All I know is that I would die for this one.

How in the world do I have over 800 of you following me? Just so you know, your following a loser who likes fluff :3 (you all already know this)

Bates

Hayden

Leah

Tommy
creator: Farmerhay
